title: anguina himalensis
intro: Anguina himalensis, also known as Himalayan fern or Himalayan sweet cicely, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Anguina himalensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
